_comment: Stop hook: Save session state to a memory file for cross-session persistence

hooks.command: mkdir -p .claude/memory && echo "## Session ended: $(date -Iseconds)" >> .claude/memory/session-state.md && echo "### Git status" >> .claude/memory/session-state.md && git status --short >> .claude/memory/session-state.md 2>/dev/null && echo "### Recent commits" >> .claude/memory/session-state.md && git log --oneline -5 >> .claude/memory/session-state.md 2>/dev/null && echo '---' >> .claude/memory/session-state.md || true

notes: Appends session end timestamp, git status, and recent commits to a persistent memory file. Creates .claude/memory/ if it doesn't exist.
